panels.description: CPU usage of the monitored object
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Average number of bytes sent by the VM of the monitored object in a measurement period
panels.title: Data Write Volume

panels.description: Average number of bytes received by the VM of the monitored object in a measurement period
panels.title: Outgoing Data Volume

panels.description: Real-time value of data disk reads and writes per second of the monitored node
panels.title: Disk IOPS

panels.description: Real-time write throughput per second of the data disk on the monitored node
panels.title: Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Real-time read throughput per second of the data disk on the monitored node
panels.title: Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Average time required for a data disk write on the monitored node
panels.title: Time Required for per Disk Write

panels.description: Average time required for a data disk read on the monitored node
panels.title: Time Required for per Disk Read

panels.description: Percentage of current disk I/O bandwidth
panels.title: Disk I/O Bandwidth Usage

panels.description: Percentage of used IOPS in the total IOPS
panels.title: IOPS Usage

panels.description: Real-time used data disk size of the monitored instance
panels.title: Used Instance Disk Size

panels.description: Real-time total data disk size of the monitored instance
panels.title: Total Instance Disk Size

panels.description: Real-time data disk usage of the monitored instance
panels.title: Instance Disk Usage

panels.description: Buffer hit rate of the database
panels.title: Buffer Hit Rate

panels.description: Incremental number of database transaction deadlocks
panels.title: Deadlocks

panels.description: Real-time response time of 80% of database SQL statements
panels.title: Response Time of 80% SQL Statements

panels.description: Real-time response time of 95% of database SQL statements
panels.title: Response Time of 95% SQL Statements

panels.description: Real-time used data disk size of the monitored node
panels.title: Used Disk Size

panels.description: Real-time total data disk size of the monitored node
panels.title: Total Disk Size

panels.description: Real-time data disk usage of the monitored node
panels.title: Disk Usage

panels.description: Real-time host flow control duration on the monitored node
panels.title: Host Flow Control Duration

panels.description: Real-time Recovery Time Objective (RTO) of the primary/standby replication of the monitored node
panels.title: Standby RTO Duration

panels.description: Average number of logins per second
panels.title: User Logins per Second

panels.description: Average number of logouts per second
panels.title: User Logouts per Second

panels.description: Real-time redo progress of the standby node in a shard. It indicates the difference of the redo progress between the primary and standby nodes.
panels.title: Standby Redo Progress

panels.description: Real-time rate of lock waiting sessions to active sessions
panels.title: Lock Waiting Session Rate

panels.description: Real-time rate of active sessions to all sessions
panels.title: Active Session Rate

panels.description: Real-time number of in-use connections in the CN connection pool
panels.title: CN Connections

panels.description: Average number of transactions committed by users per second
panels.title: User Committed Transactions per Second

panels.description: Average number of transactions rolled back by users per second
panels.title: User Rollback Transactions per Second

panels.description: Average number of transactions committed by the background per second
panels.title: Background Committed Transactions per Second

panels.description: Average number of transactions rolled back by the background per second
panels.title: Background Rollback Transactions per Second

panels.description: Average response time of user transactions
panels.title: Average Response Time of User Transactions

panels.description: Average rate of user rollback transactions to all user committed and rolled back transactions
panels.title: User Transaction Rollback Rate

panels.description: Average rate of background rollback transactions to all user committed and rolled back transactions
panels.title: Background Transaction Rollback Rate

panels.description: Average number of DDLs of user loads at the query layer
panels.title: Data Definition Language

panels.description: Average number of DMLs of user loads at the query layer
panels.title: Data Manipulation Language

panels.description: Average number of DCLs of user loads at the query layer
panels.title: Data Control Language

panels.description: Average rate of DDLs and DCLs to DDLs, DCLs, and DMLs of user loads at the query layer
panels.title: DDL and DCL Rate

panels.description: Real-time amount of data to be flushed to disks during synchronization
panels.title: Data Volume to Be Flushed to Disks

panels.description: Average number of physical reads per second
panels.title: Physical Reads per Second

panels.description: Average number of physical writes per second
panels.title: Physical Writes per Second

panels.description: Number of real-time online sessions
panels.title: Online Sessions

panels.description: Number of real-time active sessions
panels.title: Active Sessions

panels.description: Real-time percentage of online sessions on a CN (of a distributed instance) or a primary DN (of a primary/standby instance)
panels.title: Online Session Rate

panels.description: Maximum execution duration of database transactions
panels.title: Maximum Execution Duration of Database Transactions

panels.description: Real-time size of WAL logs reserved in the replication slot of a primary DN
panels.title: Size of WAL Logs In the Replication Slot

panels.description: Real-time rate of xlogs on CNs or primary DNs
panels.title: Xlog Rate

panels.description: Real-time swap memory usage of the OS
panels.title: Swap Memory Usage

panels.description: Real-time total swap memory size of the OS
panels.title: Total Swap Memory

panels.description: Real-time thread pool usage on a CN and DN
panels.title: Thread Pool Usage

panels.description: Number of sessions waiting for locks on a CN or primary DN. This metric is updated in real time
panels.title: Sessions Waiting for Locks

panels.description: Log difference between shards in the DR cluster and shards in the production cluster when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Shard Log Gap of DR Cluster

panels.description: Size of the logs to be replayed of each shard in the DR cluster when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Size of Shard Logs to Be Replayed in DR Cluster

panels.description: Rate at which logs of each shard in the DR cluster are flushed to disk when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Flushing Rate of Shard Logs in DR Cluster

panels.description: Rate at which logs of each shard in the DR cluster are replayed when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Replay Rate of Shard Logs in DR Cluster

panels.description: Real-time RPO of each shard when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Shard RPO

panels.description: Real-time RTO of each shard when streaming DR is enabled
panels.title: Shard RTO

panels.description: Number of physical and logical replication slots that are inactive
panels.title: Inactive Replication Slots

panels.description: Difference between the number of replayed read replica logs and the number of received read replica logs
panels.title: Size of Read Replica Logs Not Replayed

panels.description: Percentage of the CPU time devoted to processing application code
panels.title: User-mode CPU Time Percentage

panels.description: Percentage of the CPU time devoted to processing kernel code
panels.title: Kernel-mode CPU Time Percentage

panels.description: Percentage of time that the CPU is waiting for disk I/O operations to complete
panels.title: Disk I/O Wait Time Percentage

panels.description: Real-time number of xlogs in the data directory on a CN or DN
panels.title: Xlogs

panels.description: Real-time size of xlogs in the data directory on a CN or DN
panels.title: Xlog Size

panels.description: Real-time, used dynamic memory of the monitored object
panels.title: Used Dynamic Memory

panels.description: Real-time, dynamic memory usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Dynamic Memory Usage

panels.description: Real-time reporting of how many idle transactions there are for the monitored object
panels.title: Idle Transactions

panels.description: Real-time number of slow SQL statements in the system database on the primary DN or CN in a measurement period
panels.title: Slow SQL Statements in the System Database

panels.description: Real-time number of slow SQL statements in the user database on the primary DN or CN in a measurement period
panels.title: Slow SQL Statements in the User Database
